reviews.review_description: Three of us all share the same headset, and we all liked this game! Thought it was a good value, but we would love to have an update with more rooms!

This the only game that makes me to tall to pick anything up, I’ve changed my boundary and height setting multiple times, I’ve reinstalled the app and still too tall to pick anything up. And no there’s no in game setting to play with. Overall trash. if I could give negative stars I would.
So far it’s fun, but I’m confused. I’ve only done the office one, and still have not solved it. One tip, could you leave a first clue on the desk, maybe? Thank you!
Very fun game, got thru the first 4 and need more rooms. I can see growing and releasing 4 room packs every so often, I'm sure people will pay for addons.

and the puzzle are funny, not the usual  -think hard- games.
You should think -I'm just playing- and you solve everything.
I want more!

A really great game that proved really challenging! I've only played one level at the time of writing this review, but it actually beat me! The only thing I would suggest is possibly adding hints, but I loved the challenge, some great and unique puzzles!
My video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3HI3EhL8phY

Had a blast in these escape rooms.  Very creative and clever.  Challenging but not excessive.  Looking forward to more.  Thanks for the fun. Still laughing after I figured out two of the solutions.  Great job!
On the easy side but the experience was solid. Great esthetics for an escape game. Just want more :D

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! That means alot. :)
